name: Mesa Glow Cabin
description: A hard-sided desert cabin for guests who want dark-sky quiet, a private bath, and enough shelter to handle Big Bend wind without losing the sense of remoteness.
shortDescription: Private cabin with a bath, shaded porch, and dark-sky orientation.

photos.alt: Sunlit desert cabin with a wide view toward distant mesas.

policies.checkIn: Self check-in window starts at 4:00 PM Central.
policies.cancellation: Full refund up to 14 days before arrival. After that, dates may be rebooked at operator discretion.
policies.pets: No pets in the first-release unit while wildlife patterns are still being monitored.
policies.smoking: No smoking or open flame inside or near the structure.
policies.access: High-clearance vehicle strongly recommended. Final access notes are sent after booking confirmation.
policies.weather: Wind, dust, heat, and rapid overnight temperature changes are normal desert conditions.
